sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]',SubProd,Descr from SubProds)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, PTF, Assgnmt, ProdCode)

Update x set Amt1 = round(Amt1*c.Rate,2), Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Crcy and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt)
update TransX set ProdCode = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ProdCode is null

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Yr,Period,GL,Ledger,Division,Region,Location,Zone,PCdesc,TPname,CCdesc,Crcy,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,RefKey1,RefKey2,RefKey3,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,CC,BusCat,TTY,UWYR,Broker,TP,PTF,Contract,ProdCode,BusCatDesc,ExpNode,Flex1,FSitem,RiskTerr,ReinLoc,CatCode,AccYr,ReinName,SubProd,TransCode,Stat) (select '[batchID]-data2',Co,Yr,Period,GL,Ledger,Division,Region,Location,Zone,PCdesc,TPname,CCdesc,Crcy,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,RefKey1,RefKey2,RefKey3,Assgnmt,Txt,PC,CC,BusCat,TTY,UWYR,Broker,TP,PTF,Contract,ProdCode,BusCatDesc,ExpNode,Flex1,FSitem,RiskTerr,ReinLoc,CatCode,AccYr,ReinName,SubProd,TransCode,Stat from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, m.Field3 as GL, Crcy, m.Field5 as TTY, substring(GL,1,3) + '% ' + TTY as Assgnmt, TP, m.Field4 as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID like 'Rev Offset%' and m.Descr = x.GL and m.Field1 = (case when substring(x.GL,1,3) in ('132','148','231') then '' else x.BusCat end) and m.Field2 = (case when substring(x.GL,6,1) = '9' then '' else x.TTY end) and m.Field6 = '1' where KeyID = '[batchID]')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Ledger in (select LedgerGroup from LedgerGroups where Ledger = 'IF') and not Ledger = ''

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL like m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('4419900') and ProdCode is NULL
Update t set Co = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co where t.KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  TTY = '822' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '821'
update TransX set TTY = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2853500','3870003')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, '9999' as Co, 'filler' as GL, '' as Crcy, '' as PC, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as  Assgnmt, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, 0 as Amt1, 0 as  Amt2 , 0 as  Amt3)

delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (substring(GL,1,1) in ('5','6') or substring(GL,1,2) in ('15','18','20','21','40','41','46') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('131','141','142','143','144','145','146','147','231','287')) and not SubProd = 'G29' and not contract like 'BULK%' and not contract like 'CBULK%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat like '2%' or BusCat = '10')
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','23','24') or GL like '287%' or GL = '2810029')
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = ''
Update TransX set PTF = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and PTF is null
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((GL like '6%' and not GL like '682%') or (GL like '449%') ) and substring(CC,4,1) in ('E','I')
update TransX set  TTY = '824' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '823'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, TTY, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')

Update x set PC = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + (case when x.BusCat = '20' then 'A' else 'C' end) + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set PC = '5500000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'Investment'
update TransX set ProdCode = null where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (not PK in ('40','50') or PK is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 late RI reload', SubProd = 'G29' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (TP <> '' or Co in ('2999','3999'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and contract = 'DAH' and Co = '2008'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Zone = '1'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data3', Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Zone = '1'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Zone) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,'2' as Zone from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP,  PC,ProdCode,PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Zone = '1'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set  TTY = '627' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '617'
update TransX set  TTY = '615' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and TTY = '616'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'ASSETS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 like 'M1-1-%'
update TransX set Flex2 = '(' + substring(Flex5,6,2) + ') ' + m.name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = substring(Flex5,1,7) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 like 'M1-1-%'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(' + substring(Flex5,9,2) + ') ' + m.name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = substring(Flex5,1,10) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 like 'M1-1-01-%'
update TransX set Flex4 = '(' + substring(Flex5,12,1) + ') ' + m.name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = Flex5 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 like 'M1-1-01-06-%'
update TransX set Flex2 = '(' + substring(Flex5,4,1) + ') ' + upper(m.name) from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = substring(Flex5,1,4) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex5 like 'M1-1-%'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(' + substring(Flex5,6,1) + ') ' + m.name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on m.MapKey = Flex5 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex5 like 'M1-1-%'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TPname in ('FA','FB')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL
update TransX set Co = '2009' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '1460000000'
update TransX set Flex6 = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'London Runoff' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2009'

Update t set Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.Field3 = 'convert' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = m.Field2 and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = m.Field4 and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'607' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, BusCat, Assgnmt, ProdCode, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC,'602' as TTY, TP, BusCat, coalesce(Assgnmt,''), 'U1804' as ProdCode, Flex5, -Amt1, -Amt2 , -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000')
Update TransX set TTY = '900' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1099917','2170000')
Update TransX set GL = '4430000', TTY = '', ProdCode = '', PTF = '', TransCode = '', Assgnmt = '4419900 to 6045' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4419900'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, TTY, TP, Assgnmt, ProdCode, PTF, -Amt1,- Amt2 ,- Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3')

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and m.Field1 = '' and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set PC =(case when BusCat = '20' then '7URCAA' else '7UICAC' end) + 'NTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and t.BusCat = m.Field1 and t.TTY = m.Field2 where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')
update TransX set  TTY = '806' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '1560002' and TTY in ('804','809','815')
update TransX set  TTY = '603' where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '2150001' and TTY in ('612') and substring(Assgnmt,1,3) in ('283','284')
Update TransX set GL = '4398005', TTY = '991' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4398008'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, TP, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Assgnmt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '5500000000' as PC, '' as ProdCode, '' as PTF, '' as Assgnmt, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)

Update t set TTY = m.Field5, Flex7 = 'done' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Flow' and substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr and (t.BusCat = m.Field1 or m.Field1 = '') and (t.TTY = m.Field2 or m.Field2 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex7 is NULL and not GL in ('2853500','2851017')
update TransX set Assgnmt = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[version]',1,3) = 'Net'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, Flex5,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, '2851017' as GL, Crcy, '990' as TTY, substring(GL,1,3) + '% ' + TTY as Assgnmt, TP, '' as BusCat, PC, Flex5, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%' and not GL like '682%' and not GL = '6915002' and not substring(CC,4,1) in ('I','E'))

Update t set GL = m.Field3, ProdCode = m.Field4, PTF = m.Field5, TransCode = m.Field6, Assgnmt = m.Descr + ' to ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'ODY TP' and t.GL = m.Descr and (BusCat = m.Field6 or m.Field6 = '') where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('4419900')
update TransX set ProdCode = '', PTF = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Flex5, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex6) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC, ProdCode, PTF, Flex5, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'pass1' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, TTY, Assgnmt, TP, BusCat, PC,ProdCode,PTF,Flex5)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Amt1, Amt2, Flex1,Flex3,Flex4) (select KeyID, Co, GL, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'LIABILITIES and SHAREHOLDERS'' EQUITY' as Flex1, ' ' as Flex3, ' ' as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0))
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex5 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join MapKeyRanges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL inner join Misc_Tables x on x.Descr = m.MapKey where keyID = '[batchID]' and x.Table_ID = 'PwC Lead Sheets' and x.ID = 'BS'

update TransX set Flex5 = (case when (select sum(Amt1) from TransX where keyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 in ('M1-1-09','M1-2-6')) >= 0 then 'M1-1-09' else 'M1-2-6' end) from TransX where keyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 in ('M1-1-09','M1-2-6')
